title: The Salvage Monkeys Arrive
description: On pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part focuses on jaya’s strange sea. The Straw Hats reach waters filled with strange creatures, salvage crews, and rumors that begin pulling them toward Jaya.
scene: This scene belongs to the Jaya’s Strange Sea sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji, Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I am so glad I could have

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Crawley, who was born in the

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What does it matter, whoever it was.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's been laughing non-stop since the speech.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We've gotta dig up the water!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I hear Alubarma's in rough shape.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Well, we'll be heading over there then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Who cares, it's closed for good.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: And so she turns to me,

summary: The Straw Hats reach waters filled with strange creatures, salvage crews, and rumors that begin pulling them toward Jaya.
